tests.name: Question 1 - Custom HashMap
tests.run: (cd java && javac *.java && java Question1_MyHashMap) || (cd python && python question1_my_hash_map.py) || (cd cpp && g++ -std=c++17 -O2 -o q1 question1_my_hash_map.cpp && ./q1)
